---
title: "Hold down x and not blink."
date: 2010-07-12
forum: Cafe Games
---

### Post by chiliman on 2010-07-12
(Similar to the hold x and hold you breath thread)
See how long you can go without blinking your eyes. let go of x if you blink. whoever last the longest might win..something...
And be sure to note if your using repeat settings other than defualt.
 
Ill start.
 
xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
 
not as easy as it might seem.
 
Edit: ohhh try not to hurt yourself if your feeling discomfort its ok to blink.
